response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship habits (TDD, testing, CI/CD) and broad polyglot experience, but the resume shows minimal recent work in the JVM/Java/Kotlin/Spring ecosystem that defines this role. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration ~2016-2018) and Kotlin/Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate are absent. There's also no evidence of IDE internals or language tooling work, which is central to the position. Recent experience is concentrated in TypeScript/Node and DLang.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, dojos)
Proven ability to ship complex systems across multiple languages and stacks
Experience writing developer tooling (test runners, libraries, IDE-adjacent C/C++ work at NI LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only dated, peripheral Java exposure
No Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience listed
No IDE internals or language tooling work; recent focus is TypeScript/Node and DLang

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and limited recent Java
Strong general engineering craftsmanship and tooling mindset
